Container.Name: rv-showrunner
Container.Overview: Transcodes Jellyfin-tagged or Plex-labeled media into RV-ready files for offline playback. Select movies via the web UI, they get transcoded and written to /rv-ready for Syncthing pickup.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Web UI port

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persistent config, database, logs, and profiles

Config.Name: Media
Config.Description: Read-only source media mount (must match the active media server's media location)

Config.Name: RV Ready Output
Config.Description: Completed transcoded output — point Syncthing here

Config.Name: Cache / Working Dir
Config.Description: SSD-backed working directory for in-progress transcodes

Config.Name: Media Source
Config.Description: Active source: jellyfin or plex

Config.Name: Jellyfin URL
Config.Description: URL of your Jellyfin server

Config.Name: Jellyfin API Key
Config.Description: Jellyfin API key with library read/write access

Config.Name: Jellyfin Media Path
Config.Description: The path Jellyfin uses for media files on the host (maps to /media in container)

Config.Name: Plex URL
Config.Description: URL of your Plex Media Server

Config.Name: Plex Token
Config.Description: Plex token with source library access

Config.Name: Plex Media Path
Config.Description: The path Plex uses for media files on the host (maps to /media in container)

Config.Name: RV Tag
Config.Description: Jellyfin tag or Plex label used to mark items for syncing

Config.Name: Container Media Root
Config.Description: Container path for the mounted source media share

Config.Name: Output Root
Config.Description: Container path for completed RV-ready media

Config.Name: Cache Root
Config.Description: Container path for temporary transcode files

Config.Name: Config Root
Config.Description: Container path for persistent config and database

Config.Name: Hardware Acceleration
Config.Description: Hardware acceleration: vaapi or none

Config.Name: Hardware Device
Config.Description: Default Intel render device. The web UI can discover and save another renderD device.

Config.Name: Transcode Profile
Config.Description: Default transcode profile name (must match a YAML file in /config/profiles/)

Config.Name: Scan Interval (minutes)
Config.Description: How often to poll the active source for newly tagged or labeled items

Config.Name: Max Concurrent Transcodes
Config.Description: Maximum simultaneous ffmpeg processes
